data.content: Implementation review: tests are hermetic (mock node:child_process.execFile per Hermetic Test Policy in docs/DEVELOPING.md), exercise the full canonical pipeline (settings.toml shape -> toCanonicalLeaseIdentity -> toExecutionAgentInfo -> createLease argv), and the round-trip file additionally synthesizes the kno lease show JSON shape (per AgentInfo struct in knots/src/domain/lease.rs) and asserts deep-equal back to the original ExecutionAgentInfo. All 5 providers covered. Quality gates remain green (lint, tsc, 3117 tests, build). Approved.
